case_title: SUMMIT FINANCIAL RESOURCES L.P. A HAWAII LIMITED VS. MASSIMILIANO QUESTINI

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SUMMIT FINANCIAL RESOURCES L.P. A HAWAII LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUMMIT FINANCIAL RESOURCES L.P. A HAWAII LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT QUESTINI, MASSIMILIANO AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUMMIT FINANCIAL RESOURCES L.P. A HAWAII LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUESTINI, MASSIMILIANO AN INDIVIDUAL $231,454.89 PRINCIPAL, $291,746.52 INTEREST, $365.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $523,566.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX ) ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT QUESTINI, MASSIMILIANO AN INDIVIDUAL

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUMMIT FINANCIAL RESOURCES L.P. A HAWAII LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED APR-23-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUESTINI, MASSIMILIANO AN INDIVIDUAL PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON MAY-26-2009 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $7,889.20 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUMMIT FINANCIAL RESOURCES L.P. A HAWAII LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
